name: Seiichirou Kitano
description: The main protagonist, a boy whose face inspires terror and despair in other people's hearts, but whose true nature is that of a kind-hearted boy. name: Ukyo
description: __Occupation:__ Photographer Ukyo is a tall, slim young man with waist-length green hair and green eyes. His bangs fall freely over his face, down to his cheeks, and there is a long braid on Ukyo's right, held together using a white hair-band. ~!Ukyo's personality is out of the ordinary. He has a split personality disorder; one of his personalities is kind and caring, the other is somewhat crazy and menacing. When overcome with his more maddened and twisted personality, Ukyo develops dark lines

name: Ukyo Kuonji
description: Ten years ago, on a training trip in the country, Genma stole Ukyo's father's okonomiyaki yatai (food cart), leaving her behind and breaking the arrangement he and her father made. However, before this Ranma and Ukyo were friends, though Ranma never knew she was a girl. Shamed and ridiculed by her peers, Ukyo decided she wouldn't like boys, dressed and lived as one, and devoted herself to okonomiyaki-style martial arts. After a heated battle, Ranma discovers her true sex. Meanwhile, she discover

name: Agumon
description: Agumon is a short and stout dinosaur-like Digimon. The most well-known appearance of Agumon is in the Digimon Adventure anime as the partner of Taichi Yagami, in which Agumon's personality is extremely brave, relaxed, and funny. He can evolve into Greymon (Champion), MetalGreymon (Ultimate), WarGreymon (Mega) and Omnimon through DNA Digivolution with MetalGarurumon. name: Biao Gong
description: Biao Gong is a Great General from the state of Qin who led an invading Qin army to besiege the Wei city of Keiyou. He is known for being an instinctive general for his use of crude tactics and striking after upsetting the battlefield with his use of infantry. The Duke's skills at war have made him a great asset to the state of Qin. ~!In manga chapter 325, Duke Hyou is slain by Hou Ken!~

name: Cecilia Alcott
nativeName: セシリア・オルコット
description: Cecilia is a first year student at the IS academy and is the IS cadet representative from England, as part of the British Aristrocracy. Her father was a weak and timid man who had little influence both outside and inside the Alcott family which made her swear to never marry a weak man (A difficulty due to the shift in social status). name: Chiyochichi
description: Chiyo's father first appears within a dream of Sakaki's, where he is given to her as a pet, claiming to be both a cat and Chiyo's father. In an episode not long after, a stuffed doll in his likeness is given to Chiyo for her birthday. He continues making appearances at regular intervals throughout the series, most often in Sakaki's daydreams.

name: Chocolat Meilleure

She is not as popular as Vanilla since her outrageous temper makes most boys scared of her. In the Magical World, she lives with her grandfather, Corne, a powerful wizard who, like Chocolat, has a certain dislike for Blanca and has a bad temper. description: **Instrument:** Tuba Kumiko's classmate. She was in the tennis club in junior high school, and is a beginner in music. She admired the trumpet and joined the wind ensemble, but ends up playing the tuba. She's a bright and perky mood-maker.

name: Miu Fuurinji

name: Seth
description: Seth is a horned orphan of the "Infected" people, he lives with his adoptive mother Alma. He wishes to fight the Nemesis and his recklessness gets him into trouble. It isn't until he learns of the existence of "Radiant," the being of the Nemesis monsters he wishes to fight and destroy. name: Shino Kuribayashi
description: A female soldier and member of the Third Recon Team. She is a veteran and has a badge for hand-to-hand combat.

name: Souta Aoki
description: Aoki is a high school student with a pure heart. He possesses an extremely kind personality and a naive nature. He is secretly in love with Hashimoto at first. However, due to certain misunderstandings he begins to get closer to Ida, his new friend.
